subject: Re: S76 offer
body:
13 


----- Original Message ----
From: "LVJET@aol.com" <LVJET@aol.com>
To: JEEPROJECT@YAHOO.COM
Sent: Monday, May 12, 2008 8:33:15 AM
Subject: S76 offer

Jeffrey,
Sean has received an offer from a Brazilian buyer, could be same as December offer.
12.3M offer,,,Sean was told by broker they would go to 12.6M
please advise how to proceed?
For Mr. E please.
 This is an offer from the Brazilians again.  Mr. Oliveria has suggested that he would pay $12.6.  He does not expect a response today an understands the owner may not even see the offer until Monday.  I would suggest if we decided to respond we draft a more formal Letter of Intent/Purchase Agreement with much stronger language.  
 I have also been told that we might see an offer next week from Wayne Huizenga next week.  
                                                                                                                                                                          
Sean J. Lancaster
Bristol Associates Inc.
)+1-540-665-5135 direct
(+1-202-682-4000 ext 1130 Main Office
)+1-540-533-8183 Mobile
4+1-540-301-0050 FAX
*slancaster@bristolassociates.com
:www.bristolassociates.com 
 
This message may contain confidential and/or legally privileged information.  If you are not the intended recipient of the message, please destroy it. Any unauthorized dissemination, distribution or copying of the material in this message, and any attachments to the message, is strictly forbidden. (c) 2008 all rights reserved.
 

________________________________

From:ceo@planaer.com.br [mailto:ceo@planaer.com.br] 
Sent: Friday, May 09, 2008 2:52 PM
To: slancaster@bristolassociates.com
Subject: OFFER TO PURCHASE YOUR 2007 SK76++ sn 760667
 
Dear  Sean,
 
I have the following offer to purchase for this helicopter sn 760667: 
 
1. The helicopter shall be delivered in USA , with the FAA  C of A export certificate to Brazil or to Venezuela ( to be advised) 
 
2. On the price shall be included the SK76++ initial course, in the Flight Safety School . Courses for 2 Pilots + 2 mechanics ( at your costs)
 
3. Our offer is U$ 12.3Million.
 
4. If you accept that we can formalize and fax an OFFER TO PURCHASE with a U$ 150K in IATS- Insured Aircraft Title Service, USA ,  escrow refundable deposit,  to retire the helicopter from the market and schedulle the acft. visit and the pre-purchase inspection.
 
We also need your Aircraft Purchase Agreement draft to be analised and approved by our attorneys
 
This offer is valid until may 12, 2008 16:00hs local time.
 
Sincerely
 
Jose A. Lins Oliveira     
CEO
PLANAER-Aviation Trade Brazil
Ph 55-11-3476 9951  // Cel.  55-11-9192 9887
Fax 55-11-5016 3860  
www.planaer.com.br
 
 




________________________________

Dear  Sean,

 

I have the following offer to purchase for this helicopter sn 760667: 

 

1. The helicopter shall be delivered in USA , with the FAA  C of A export certificate to Brazil or to Venezuela ( to be advised) 

 

2. On the price shall be included the SK76++ initial course, in the Flight Safety School . Courses for 2 Pilots + 2 mechanics ( at your costs)

 

3. Our offer is U$ 12.3Million.

 

4. If you accept that we can formalize and fax an OFFER TO PURCHASE with a U$ 150K in IATS- Insured Aircraft Title Service, USA ,  escrow refundable deposit,  to retire the helicopter from the market and schedulle the acft. visit and the pre-purchase inspection.

 

We also need your Aircraft Purchase Agreement draft to be analised and approved by our attorneys

 

This offer is valid until may 12, 2008 16:00hs local time.

 

Sincerely

 

Jose A. Lins Oliveira
